```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database partitioning for large tables"
---
# Database Partitioning
## Task
Implement table partitioning for large dataset management.
## Requirements
1. Choose partition strategy (range, hash, list). 2. Define partition key.
3. Automate partition creation and maintenance. 4. Archive old partitions.
5. Monitor partition sizes.
## Constraints
- Partition key should match query patterns. Automate partition management. Monitor skew.
## Success Criteria
- Queries hit single partition. Partition management automated. Old data archived.
```
